# ShopRay

> A professional e-commerce shop template built with React, TypeScript, and Express.js.

ShopRay is a fully featured online shop with a React frontend, Node.js/Express backend, and a separate admin panel. It is designed as a template for small to medium businesses in the EU, with full GDPR compliance, Stripe payment integration, and Supabase authentication.

## Key Features

- Product catalog with search, filtering, and category browsing
- Shopping cart and Stripe-powered checkout (hosted payment page)
- Customer accounts: order history, addresses, profile, wishlist, support tickets
- Authentication: email/password, Google OAuth, two-factor authentication (TOTP), password reset
- GDPR compliance: consent banner, data export (Art. 20), account deletion (Art. 17)
- LMIV nutritional information for food and supplement products (EU food labeling regulation)
- Admin panel: products, orders, customers, reviews, support tickets, shipping settings
- 4 color themes × dark/light mode = 8 visual themes
- Mobile-first responsive design

## Pages

- `/` — Homepage with featured products, categories, reviews, FAQ
- `/shop` — Product search and filtering
- `/kategorien` — Product categories
- `/produkt/:slug` — Individual product detail with images, description, reviews, nutritional info
- `/ueber-uns` — About the shop
- `/faq` — Frequently asked questions
- `/kontakt` — Contact form
- `/versand` — Shipping information
- `/impressum` — Legal imprint (German law)
- `/datenschutz` — Privacy policy (GDPR)
- `/agb` — Terms and conditions
- `/widerruf` — Right of withdrawal

## Technology

Frontend: React 19, TypeScript, Vite, SCSS (7-1 architecture), Zustand
Backend: Node.js, Express, TypeScript, Zod, Nodemailer
Database: PostgreSQL via Supabase (self-hostable)
Auth: Supabase Auth with MFA/TOTP and Google OAuth
Payments: Stripe (hosted checkout page)
Deployment: Vercel (3 separate projects — frontend, backend, admin)
